Name: GetBookingsByNonsenseName_ShouldReturnNoResults
Description: GET /booking?firstname=Unknown should return an empty or minimal list for a nonsense name.

Name: ResetRoleFilter_ShouldRestoreAllUsers
Description: After filtering, resetting the form should show all users regardless of role.

Name: FilterByAdminRole_ShouldReturnResults
Description: Filtering System Users by the Admin role should return at least one result (the built-in Admin account).

Name: GetBookingsByFirstName_ShouldReturnFilteredResults
Description: GET /booking?firstname=X should return only bookings with that first name.

Name: FilterByEssRole_ShouldReturnResults
Description: Filtering System Users by the ESS role should return results when ESS users are present.

Name: GetAllBookings_ShouldReturnNonEmptyList
Description: GET /booking should return a non-empty list of booking IDs.

Name: GetBookingsByFullName_ShouldBeMoreSpecificThanFirstNameAlone
Description: GET /booking?firstname=X&lastname=Y should narrow results further than firstname alone.
